title: SV: class method calling from another class

features.name: virtual function call via object handle from another class
features.description: Code should include a virtual function defined in one class and called from a method of another class using an object handle

features.name: package with classes and cross_class method invocation in constructor
features.description: Code should include a package containing two classes where one class's constructor calls a method of an object created from the other class
